intent: Bind ExtensionAPI tool definition lookup to AgentSession's full tool definition registry, so extensions like pi-script can invoke hidden built-in and extension tools after model-visible active tools are narrowed.
find:
getActiveTools: () => this.getActiveToolNames(),
            getAllTools: () => this.getAllTools(),
            setActiveTools: (toolNames) => this.setActiveToolsByName(toolNames),
replace:
getActiveTools: () => this.getActiveToolNames(),
            getAllTools: () => this.getAllTools(),
            getToolDefinition: (name) => this.getToolDefinition(name),
            getAllRegisteredTools: () => Array.from(this._toolDefinitions.values()),
            setActiveTools: (toolNames) => this.setActiveToolsByName(toolNames),

references.reason: Pi Script needs a full definition lookup over built-in and extension tools even when only script_run is active/model-visible.

intent: Do not overwrite AgentSession-backed ExtensionAPI tool lookup actions with ExtensionRunner-only lookup; preserve the full built-in + extension tool registry when available.
replace:
this.runtime.getToolDefinition = actions.getToolDefinition ?? ((toolName) => this.getToolDefinition(toolName)); // pi-claude-code compat: this.runtime.getToolDefinition = (toolName) => this.getToolDefinition(toolName);
        this.runtime.getAllRegisteredTools = actions.getAllRegisteredTools ?? (() => this.getAllRegisteredTools());

references.reason: Pi Script needs full AgentSession tool lookup rather than ExtensionRunner-only custom tool lookup.
